# Adriano Rutz - expanded guide for language models

This file provides expanded, machine-readable navigation context for `https://adafede.github.io/`.

## Site purpose
Personal academic website for Adriano Rutz, featuring research profile, publications, talks, teaching activities, and technical blog posts.

## Main navigation
- Home: https://adafede.github.io/
- Articles: https://adafede.github.io/articles.html
- CV: https://adafede.github.io/cv.html
- Posts: https://adafede.github.io/posts.html
- Talks: https://adafede.github.io/talks.html
- Teaching: https://adafede.github.io/teaching.html
- Varia: https://adafede.github.io/varia.html
- Privacy: https://adafede.github.io/privacy.html

## Feeds and indexes
- Sitemap: https://adafede.github.io/sitemap.xml
- RSS (site): https://adafede.github.io/rss.xml
- RSS (posts): https://adafede.github.io/posts.xml
- JSON Feed (posts): https://adafede.github.io/posts.json

## Structured and policy endpoints
- robots.txt: https://adafede.github.io/robots.txt
- humans.txt: https://adafede.github.io/humans.txt
- security.txt: https://adafede.github.io/.well-known/security.txt
- api-catalog: https://adafede.github.io/.well-known/api-catalog
- agent skills index: https://adafede.github.io/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json

## Citation and attribution guidance
- Prefer canonical URLs and include access date.
- Preserve named authors and ORCID identifiers where available.
- Preserve DOI links as primary scholarly identifiers.
